name: National Ambulance Service
description: Free emergency ambulance service available across India. Call 108 for medical emergencies including accidents, heart attacks, pregnancy complications.

name: Police Emergency
description: Police emergency helpline for crime, accidents, and law and order issues. Also handles fire and medical emergencies.

name: Women Helpline
description: National helpline for women in distress - domestic violence, harassment, abuse, dowry issues. Available 24/7 in multiple languages.

name: Childline India
description: 24-hour helpline for children in need of care and protection. Reports child abuse, child labor, missing children, trafficking.

name: Kisan Call Center
description: Free helpline for farmers to get advice on farming techniques, crop diseases, weather updates, market prices, and government schemes for agriculture.

name: Ayushman Bharat Helpline
description: Check eligibility and get help with Ayushman Bharat PMJAY health insurance scheme. Find empanelled hospitals near you.

name: Elder Helpline
description: National helpline for senior citizens facing abuse, neglect, or needing assistance with pensions, healthcare, legal matters.

name: Vandrevala Foundation Mental Health Helpline
description: Free 24/7 mental health helpline. Counseling in Hindi and English for depression, anxiety, stress, suicidal thoughts.

name: National Poison Information Centre
description: Expert advice for poisoning emergencies - pesticides, medicines, chemicals, snake bites. Located at AIIMS Delhi.

name: National Disaster Management Helpline
description: Helpline for natural disasters - floods, earthquakes, cyclones. Information on relief, evacuation, shelter locations.

name: Common Service Center - Madhya Pradesh
description: CSC provides government services like Aadhaar enrollment, PAN card, passport, scheme applications, banking. Find nearest CSC at locator.csccloud.in

name: Common Service Center - Uttar Pradesh
description: CSC provides government services like Aadhaar enrollment, PAN card, passport, scheme applications, banking. Find nearest CSC at locator.csccloud.in

name: Common Service Center - Bihar
description: CSC provides government services like Aadhaar enrollment, PAN card, passport, scheme applications, banking. Find nearest CSC at locator.csccloud.in

name: Railway Enquiry
description: Indian Railways enquiry for train status, PNR check, seat availability, general railway information.

name: Electricity Complaint - General
description: Report power outages, billing issues, and electrical hazards. Contact your state electricity board. General helpline varies by state.

name: RTI (Right to Information) Helpline
description: Help with filing RTI applications to get information from government departments. Available in Hindi and English.

name: National Consumer Helpline
description: File complaints about defective products, poor services, unfair trade practices. Free advice on consumer rights.

name: Cyber Crime Helpline
description: Report online fraud, UPI scams, social media harassment, identity theft, online banking fraud.

name: Blood Bank Helpline - Red Cross
description: Find nearest blood bank, request blood units, blood donation camps information.

name: LPG Gas Emergency
description: Report LPG gas leaks, cylinder delivery issues, connection problems. Also for PM Ujjwala Yojana queries.
